historyInsights.emptyHint: Change the conditions above or apply the current History filters.
historyInsights.qualityUnsupported: Sessions over the analysis limit or unsupported
historyInsights.qualityExplanation: Summary values are aggregated from target sessions that could be analyzed. A ≥ marker identifies a confirmed lower bound when some values are missing. An exact zero remains 0; a metric with no available values is shown as Unknown.
historyInsights.qualityFileExplanation: Change-event totals and File AI Change History cards may differ because their aggregation, reparsing, grouping, and pagination rules are different.
historyInsights.qualityNumericOverflow: One or more totals exceeded JavaScript's exact integer range. Affected values are capped at the largest exact integer and shown as confirmed lower bounds.
historyInsights.showingPrevious: Updating failed. Showing the previous saved result; it may be out of date.
historyInsights.filterAllProjectsHint: Do not filter by project. Projects outside the current candidates and projects added later are also included.
historyInsights.filterOpenHint: Open target conditions to change source, date range, storage location, project groups, and tags together.
historyInsights.filterApplyToHistorySele: Selected. Apply will update both History Insights and History. Toggling this alone does not change History.
historyInsights.filterApplyToHistoryUnse: Not selected. Apply will not change the History filters.
historyInsights.filterPreferenceError: The History application preference could not be saved. The previous value was restored.
historyInsights.filterDateInvalidError: Enter real dates for From and To.
historyInsights.filterDateOrderError: From must be on or before To.
historyInsights.filterValidationError: Review the values. The target conditions have not been applied yet.
historyInsights.filterApplyError: The target conditions could not be applied. Check the values and try again.
historyInsights.filterRollbackFailed: The previous History Insights conditions could not be restored after a storage error. Reload the window before applying filters again.
historyInsights.filterStaleError: The target conditions changed. Review the current conditions and apply them again.

history.filterState.rollbackFailed: The previous filter state could not be restored after a storage error. Reload the window before changing the filters again.
